name: LinkedIn
description: Browse your LinkedIn feed, publish posts, comment, react to content, and get a daily digest of your network. Requires LinkedIn OAuth configured in the APIs page.

schedules.name: linkedin-morning-digest
schedules.description: Every morning at 8:00: fetches LinkedIn feed and stores it for digest.

examples: Give me my LinkedIn morning digest

commands.name: linkedin
commands.shortDescription: Show your LinkedIn feed and network updates
commands.description: Call linkedin_get_feed to fetch the latest 10 posts from the user's LinkedIn feed. Summarize the most interesting or relevant content, highlighting posts from close connections or trending topics. Be professional and keep the summary brief and scannable.
